com.hp.workpath.api

Class Workpath

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath

  • public class Workpath
extends java.lang.Object

    This class includes all initialization API that uses HP Workpath SDK service.

    All clients have to call initialize() method before calling HP Workpath SDK, then need to catch the result to notify the success or error to a user.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  Workpath.actions
      Actions of Workpath SDK service
      static class  Workpath.permissions
      Permissions of Workpath SDK service

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Workpath getInstance()
      Returns an instance of Workpath SDK service when service is ready to use.
      int getVersionCode()
      Provides the version code of Workpath SDK API which is running in an application.
      java.lang.String getVersionName()
      Provides the version name of Workpath SDK API which is running in an application.
      void initialize(android.content.Context context)
      Initializes Workpath SDK service.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static Workpath getInstance()

        Returns an instance of Workpath SDK service when service is ready to use.

        Returns:
        Workpath The object of Workpath SDK service

      • getVersionCode

        public int getVersionCode()

        Provides the version code of Workpath SDK API which is running in an application.

        Returns:
        versionCode The version code of Workpath SDK API
        Since:
        API 1

      • getVersionName

        public java.lang.String getVersionName()

        Provides the version name of Workpath SDK API which is running in an application.

        Returns:
        versionName The version name of Workpath SDK API
        Since:
        API 1

      • initialize

        public void initialize(android.content.Context context)
                throws SsdkUnsupportedException,
                       java.lang.SecurityException

        Initializes Workpath SDK service. If it fails, method throws an exception that includes the information of the reasons. Reasons are :

        • SDK service is not installed on a printer
        • SDK service needs to update
        • SDK service needs a permission

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running. If it's null, initialization will be failed.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - If context is null
        SsdkUnsupportedException - If SDK needs to update or SDK is not compatible version or HP Workpath SDK Services is not installed properly
        java.lang.SecurityException - If SDK doesn't have the permission to access an application
        Since:
        API 1
